mapper.select:
select review_id as reviewId, meetup_id as meetupId, member_id as memberId, content, rating, likes_count as likesCount, views_count as viewsCount, is_public as isPublic, case when delete_yn = 'Y' then 1 else 0 end as deleteYn, to_char(created_at, 'YYYY-MM-DD') as createdAt, to_char(updated_at, 'YYYY-MM-DD') as updatedAt from reviews where meetup_id = #{meetupId} and delete_yn = 'N'
order by likes_count desc, review_id desc
order by review_id desc

select review_id as reviewId, meetup_id as meetupId, member_id as memberId, content, rating, likes_count as likesCount, views_count as viewsCount, is_public as isPublic, case when delete_yn = 'Y' then 1 else 0 end as deleteYn, to_char(created_at, 'YYYY-MM-DD') as createdAt, to_char(updated_at, 'YYYY-MM-DD') as updatedAt from reviews where review_id = #{reviewId} and delete_yn = 'N'
mapper.update: update reviews set content = #{content}, rating = #{rating}, updated_at = current_timestamp where review_id = #{reviewId} and delete_yn = 'N'
update reviews set delete_yn = 'Y', updated_at = current_timestamp where review_id = #{reviewId}
update reviews set is_public = #{isPublic}, updated_at = current_timestamp where review_id = #{reviewId}
mapper.select:
select review_id as reviewId, meetup_id as meetupId, member_id as memberId, content, rating, likes_count as likesCount, views_count as viewsCount, is_public as isPublic, case when delete_yn = 'Y' then 1 else 0 end as deleteYn, to_char(created_at, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') as createdAt, to_char(updated_at, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') as updatedAt from reviews where member_id = #{memberId} and delete_yn = 'N'
order by likes_count desc, review_id desc
order by review_id desc

select review_id as reviewId, meetup_id as meetupId, member_id as memberId, content, rating, likes_count as likesCount, views_count as viewsCount, is_public as isPublic, case when delete_yn = 'Y' then 1 else 0 end as deleteYn, to_char(created_at, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') as createdAt, to_char(updated_at, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') as updatedAt from reviews where content like '%' || #{keyword} || '%' and delete_yn = 'N' and is_public = 'Y' order by review_id desc
select count(*) from review_likes where review_id = #{reviewId} and member_id = #{memberId}
mapper.delete: delete from review_likes where review_id = #{reviewId} and member_id = #{memberId}
mapper.update: update reviews set likes_count = likes_count + 1 where review_id = #{reviewId}
update reviews set likes_count = likes_count - 1 where review_id = #{reviewId}
mapper.select: select likes_count from reviews where review_id = #{reviewId}

select review_id as reviewId, meetup_id as meetupId, member_id as memberId, content, rating, likes_count as likesCount, views_count as viewsCount, is_public as isPublic, case when delete_yn = 'Y' then 1 else 0 end as deleteYn, to_char(created_at, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') as createdAt, to_char(updated_at, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') as updatedAt from reviews where content like '%' || #{keyword} || '%' order by review_id desc

select review_id as reviewId, meetup_id as meetupId, member_id as memberId, content, rating, likes_count as likesCount, views_count as viewsCount, is_public as isPublic, case when delete_yn = 'Y' then 1 else 0 end as deleteYn, to_char(created_at, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') as createdAt, to_char(updated_at, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') as updatedAt from reviews where member_id = #{memberId} order by review_id desc
mapper.update: update reviews set is_public = 'N', updated_at = current_timestamp where review_id = #{id}
update reviews set delete_yn = 'Y', updated_at = current_timestamp where review_id = #{id}
